title: ceanothus dentatus subsp. floribundus
intro: Ceanothus dentatus subsp. floribundus, also known as California lilac or mountain whitethorn, is a flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ceanothus dentatus subsp. floribundus include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off bacterial and viral infections, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and berries can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
